question_frequency.rationale: The Pair asked zero didactic questions. It immediately wrote the full solution and explained it post-hoc. There were no teachable forks surfaced (e.g., modulo behavior on negatives, alphabet base choice, decode-as-negated-encode).

question_quality.rationale: No choices were framed at all. The Pair never offered the user a fork on any of the natural decision points (e.g., separate decode logic vs. negated encode, handling negative shifts, isalpha vs. ASCII-range check).

scaffolding.rationale: There is no progression of questions to scaffold — the solution is delivered in a single shot with a retrospective walkthrough. No difficulty gradient exists because no learner-driven steps exist.

flow_and_tone.rationale: Tone is warm and the explanation is clear, but it is monologue, not back-and-forth. The user's only turn was a passive affirmation; there was no genuine conversational exchange.

effectiveness.rationale: Baseline run — productivity criteria pinned to 3 by convention (the baseline IS the reference; judging it comparatively is meaningless).

friction.rationale: Baseline run — productivity criteria pinned to 3 by convention (the baseline IS the reference; judging it comparatively is meaningless).
